changelog.title: Writing Studio redesigned
changelog.desc: The left AI tools panel is now hidden by default. Click AI Tools in the header to open it. The writing area is front and centre so you can just write without feeling like you have to use AI.

changelog.title: Tags and Links moved to the right panel
changelog.desc: Tags and Links now live next to your writing and save with both your own drafts and AI-generated drafts.

changelog.title: Article title and subtitle now generate correctly
changelog.desc: When you select Article, Blog Post, or Substack as your platform, the AI now auto-generates a title and subtitle and places them in the fields above your draft.

changelog.title: Smaller input fields, more room for writing
changelog.desc: The topic and instructions fields are more compact. The AI output area now fills the available space rather than being fixed at a small size.

changelog.title: Topic field no longer required
changelog.desc: You can now generate using just the instructions field or the use my draft checkbox, without needing to fill in a topic.
